segments.text: Nair into bair! Donkey Kong's so heavy, heavy... racking up damage with the pressure there, but here...
segments.original_text: はしません降り空Nからの空中後ろですがドンキー今後重い重い あっちさあプレスで火力を稼ぎますがここはね

segments.text: There's also a confirmed punish - up tilt pickup into up air!
segments.original_text: 確定反撃もありますと上強で拾って空上

full_text: Nair into bair! Donkey Kong's so heavy, heavy... racking up damage with the pressure there, but here... There's also a confirmed punish - up tilt pickup into up air!

corrections.original: 思い思い あっちさあプレスので
corrections.corrected: 重い重い あっちさあプレスで

corrections.rule: kanji homophone: 上京→上強, 空中へ→空上
